DR- Period of initially perceived valid trace is based on DWLs obtained with BM 6 as the reference. Due to erroneous BM ties, the lack of tie-ing in BM 6 and multiple BMs used as an ACTIVE PRIMARY, this period of data cannot be confidently corrected with a gauge correction. It will be used for discharge estimation but stage data will not be published. Unfortunately, due to nonconfidence in stage values (and therefore MGH values) the measurements during this period ought not be published nor used for future curve development. Measurement Grade: DO NOT USE is applied to them in Discharge Summary.
